description: Composition Purple printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a V-neck with sequin and stitching embellishments, short sleeves, contrast print at yoke, and long side vents Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the short sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The bright print will lift your mood while the print and embellishments will give you an Indian ethnic air. Wear this over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
